observations: Ground-mounted commercial/utility-scale solar array visible — multiple rows of panels on metal racking across open paddock.
No workers visible in frame; this appears to be an established or near-complete installation.
Panels appear to be tilted fixed-tilt ground-mount racking, oriented northward (Southern Hemisphere orientation consistent).
Grass/vegetation visible beneath and around the array — vegetation management may be required.
No electrical components, inverter station, isolators, or cabling visible in this frame.

installQualityFlags.message: Vegetation under and around the array is long — overgrown grass is a fire hazard and can shade lower panel rows, reducing output and causing hotspot risk. Confirm site vegetation management plan is in place.
No DC conduit or cable runs visible in this frame — cannot confirm DC cable protection compliance. Inspect cable trays and conduit underneath the racking before sign-off.
Panel serial numbers and compliance plates are not legible at this distance — ensure a close-up legible photo of each panel serial is captured for REC registry matching before handover.

timeOnTaskNote: No active worker is visible in this frame, so task pacing cannot be assessed. If the array is nearing completion, prioritise final inspections — DC cabling, labelling, and inverter station signage — before CER lodgement.
nextSteps: Walk the full perimeter of the array and inspect all DC cable runs to confirm cables are protected in UV-rated conduit along the racking and at every roof/ground penetration point.
Check all isolator labels, system-rating signage, and emergency shutdown procedure labels at the inverter station — these are the most commonly failed CER compliance items on ground-mount jobs.
Arrange vegetation slashing or mowing under and around the array to reduce fire risk and prevent shading on lower panel rows before handover to the customer.

visualCallouts.label: Long grass — fire risk
visualCallouts.message: Overgrown vegetation under the array is a fire hazard and will cause shading. Get it slashed before handover.

visualCallouts.label: Serial photo needed
visualCallouts.message: Panel serials aren't readable from here — get close-up shots of each compliance plate for the REC registry.

spokenCue.say: Slash that long grass under the array before handover.
